project: PRJ03270 - Archer - Norway - Stavanger - Unknown Well - Rental
comment: Archer have requested 2x RBT004 and 4x PRC041 for Rental beginning Monday 13th

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16) - MFC
comment: Abdil travelling to Esbjerg today on direct ABZ-EBJ flight, joining rig tomorrow. SLB currently broaching through scale near surface. Issues with debris buildup after broaching runs. MFC log looking likely in order to understand extent of scale.

project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
comment: Melissa flying to Heathrow on the 10:25 flight from Aberdeen today. Expected to arrive at wellsite 3-4pm after car hire collection. Lookahead has 3.5" tubing logging tomorrow morning. MFC60 logging in 7" planned for Sunday

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21) - MFC
comment:
SLB currently running Well Explorer tool followed by 4.5” drift
Depending on the result of the Well explorer run will decide on how to proceed with MFC

project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
comment: Gorm backload delayed, therefore Archer rental required for 1x MFC24. Equipment being collected this afternoon by Dyce Carriers

project: PRJ03119 - Archer - Archer - Blackburn - Unknown - NA
comment: Request from Archer for ballistics qualified READ engineer ~23rd April

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21) - MFC
comment: Tools back at surface no damage or excessive build up of well debris. Rig down wait on decision from Total on how to proceed next

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21) - MFC
comment: When begging to POOH over pull was noticed and pulling more than the maximum allowed tension. Unable to come free decision to wait for fingers to close and POOH. Decision on next steps will be made tomorrow. Potential to run well explorer tool next then switch to braided cable and re run MFC.
